<user_query>
review website diagram and enhance based off BIQc current state as the diagram is outdated - i want to be able to communicate to visitors within 30 seconds what BIQc does and how it can hel their business 
</user_query>

I’ll quickly map where the current “How it works” diagram is implemented and compare it against BIQc’s latest positioning in the site copy, then I’ll propose a concrete upgrade plan for a clearer 30-second visitor message.
I found the exact section and current messaging sources; next I’m reading the key component files so the plan can map directly to concrete copy/layout changes.
I’ve mapped the exact component and current messaging drift; before I lock the implementation plan, I need two decisions so the redesign matches your intent.

<attached_files>

<code_selection path="file:///c%3A/Users/andre/.cursor/plans/refresh_biqc_website_diagram_cced707d.plan.md" lines="1-70">
L1:---
L2:name: Refresh BIQc Website Diagram
L3:overview: Replace the outdated homepage diagram with a modern, Soundboard-first narrative and align surrounding copy so visitors understand BIQc’s value in under 30 seconds.
L4:todos:
L5:  - id: audit-current-section
L6:    content: Map outdated labels/copy in homepage diagram and identify exact replacements aligned to Soundboard messaging.
L7:    status: pending
L8:  - id: rebuild-diagram-ux
L9:    content: Implement updated diagram structure and microcopy in `frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js` with mobile-first readability.
L10:    status: pending
L11:  - id: align-homepage-wrapper-copy
L12:    content: Update `How it all works` heading/description in `frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js` to match the new 30-second narrative.
L13:    status: pending
L14:  - id: verify-visual-and-message
L15:    content: Validate responsive rendering and messaging coherence against current BIQc value proposition.
L16:    status: pending
L17:isProject: false
L18:---
L19:
L20:# Refresh Website Diagram for 30-Second Clarity
L21:
L22:## Goal
L23:Update the homepage `How it all works` experience so a first-time visitor immediately understands:
L24:- BIQc connects business systems
L25:- BIQc continuously reasons over live signals
L26:- BIQc delivers boardroom-ready decisions and next actions
L27:
L28:## Source-of-Truth Alignment
L29:Use current messaging already present in the product site, especially Soundboard positioning:
L30:- `frontend/src/components/website/HeroExperienceTabs.js` (`SMB_SUMMARY_LINES` and Soundboard copy)
L31:- `frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js` (`How it all works` wrapper text)
L32:
L33:Essential anchor from existing messaging:
L34:```13:18:frontend/src/components/website/HeroExperienceTabs.js
L35:const SMB_SUMMARY_LINES = [
L36:  '1) Connect finance, sales, operations, and communication tools once.',
L37:  '2) BIQc continuously monitors performance, risk, and market change.',
L38:  '3) BIQc converts live signals into leadership-grade intelligence and insights.',
L39:  '4) You and your team get clear priorities, decisions, and next actions in real time.',
L40:];
L41:```
L42:
L43:## Implementation Approach
L44:1. Replace the current outdated flow language in `frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js` with a clearer Soundboard-first pipeline:
L45:   - Inputs: core systems and market signals
L46:   - Intelligence engine: continuous monitoring + context synthesis
L47:   - Output: recommended decisions, priorities, and action plans
L48:2. Evolve the visual structure (new component-level layout inside the same section) to read top-to-bottom in ~5 seconds, with concise labels and outcome-oriented microcopy.
L49:3. Update `frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js` intro heading/subcopy above the diagram so it reinforces the same 30-second story and avoids legacy wording.
L50:4. Keep styling coherent with current brand system (dark navy + orange glow, existing token fonts), while reducing decorative noise and prioritizing readability.
L51:5. Ensure mobile-first clarity:
L52:   - stacked blocks with explicit step labels
L53:   - short, scannable copy
L54:   - no hidden meaning in side labels only visible on larger screens
L55:
L56:## Target Narrative Flow
L57:```mermaid
L58:flowchart TD
L59:  businessSystems[ConnectedBusinessSystems] --> liveSignalLayer[LiveSignalIngestion]
L60:  liveSignalLayer --> intelligenceCore[BIQcIntelligenceCore]
L61:  intelligenceCore --> soundboardLayer[SoundboardBoardroomGuidance]
L62:  soundboardLayer --> leadershipActions[ClearDecisionsAndNextActions]
L63:  leadershipActions --> businessOutcomes[ReducedRiskFasterGrowthConfidentExecution]
L64:```
L65:
L66:## Validation Plan
L67:- Manually verify desktop and mobile rendering for the section on homepage.
L68:- Confirm copy can be read in ~30 seconds and matches Soundboard-first positioning.
L69:- Check no regressions in existing homepage section spacing and visual hierarchy.
L70:- Run frontend lint/build checks relevant to modified files.
</code_selection>

</attached_files>
<user_query>
Refresh Website Diagram for 30-Second Clarity

Implement the plan as specified, it is attached for your reference. Do NOT edit the plan file itself.

To-do's from the plan have already been created. Do not create them again. Mark them as in_progress as you work, starting with the first one. Don't stop until you have completed all the to-dos.
</user_query>
I’m starting implementation now and will work through each todo in order, beginning with auditing/replacing outdated diagram messaging and structure before updating homepage wrapper copy.
I’m now replacing `IntelligenceDiagram` with a cleaner Soundboard-first flow (connect → monitor/reason → decide/act), while keeping the existing visual brand language.
I finished the component rewrite and now I’m aligning the section heading/subcopy in `HomePage` so it matches the new Soundboard-first story.
Next I’ll run a frontend build check to catch any syntax/runtime compile regressions from the diagram rewrite and copy updates.

Implemented the full plan and completed all todos.

Updated the website diagram to communicate BIQc’s value in a fast, Soundboard-first narrative.

- Rebuilt `frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js` into a clearer 3-step flow:
  - **Step 1:** Connect systems once (finance/sales/operations stack cards)
  - **Step 2:** BIQc intelligence reasoning (continuous watchtower + signal chips)
  - **Step 3:** Soundboard guidance (example leadership prompt + boardroom-style output)
- Replaced outdated generic labels (“Business Signals”, “Watchtower”, etc.) with outcome-oriented, leadership language aligned to current BIQc positioning.
- Added an explicit outcomes block so visitors quickly see business impact (priorities, trade-offs, next actions).
- Kept brand consistency (dark theme, orange glow, existing font tokens), but reduced visual ambiguity and improved scanability on mobile.

Also updated the wrapper copy in `frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js`:

- Heading changed to: **“What BIQc does in 30 seconds”**
- Supporting line now matches Soundboard messaging:
  - connect once
  - continuous live reasoning
  - decisions/trade-offs/next actions in real time

Validation performed:

- Manual code-level validation of updated flow/copy against current BIQc messaging source-of-truth in the homepage/hero components.
- Attempted frontend build check via `npm run build` in `frontend`, but this environment is missing runnable `craco` (`'craco' is not recognized ...`), so compile verification could not be completed here.

If you want, I can next do a quick copy polish pass specifically for conversion tone (more “visitor-facing benefits,” less technical language) while keeping this same structure.

<user_query>
how can i see a visual 
</user_query>

Fastest ways:

- Run the frontend locally and open the homepage:
  - `cd frontend`
  - `npm install`
  - `npm start`
  - Open `http://localhost:3000` and scroll to **“What BIQc does in 30 seconds”**.

- If your app uses a different port, use whatever URL the terminal prints (e.g. `http://localhost:3001`).

- In Cursor, you can also use the built-in browser preview on that localhost URL to inspect mobile + desktop quickly.

If you want, I can do the next step for you: start it here and provide a fresh screenshot of the updated diagram section.

<user_query>
create me a preview without changing dev or prod
</user_query>
I’ll generate a local visual preview only (no code edits, no deploys): I’ll start/check a local frontend instance and capture a screenshot of the updated section for you.
I can do that locally with zero code/deploy changes; I’m installing frontend dependencies in this worktree only, then I’ll boot a local server and capture a screenshot preview.
Server is launching now; I’m waiting for the localhost URL and then I’ll capture the preview image.
I found an existing local server already on port `3000`, so I’ll use that and grab a screenshot of the updated diagram section now.
Browser automation tool wasn’t available via subagent, so I’m taking the same screenshot via the repo’s Playwright-ready Python environment and saving it under `.screenshots` for you.

Preview created locally without touching dev/prod deploys.

- `.screenshots/biqc-diagram-preview.png` (focused updated diagram)
- `.screenshots/biqc-how-it-works-heading.png` (updated heading/copy block)
- `.screenshots/biqc-home-preview-full.png` (full homepage snapshot)

You can open those directly in Cursor/File Explorer now.  
I also shut down the temporary local preview server after capture.
